statement: No current memory system achieves 0.80 or higher recall at 1 on multi-session coherence at 10-session depth
falsification_criteria: If any one of {Letta, mem0, MemGPT, Claude-built-in-memory} achieves mean recall@1 >= 0.80 on the multi_session_coherence task (N>=10 runs) with 95% bootstrap CI lower bound >= 0.80, this claim is falsified.

If the held-out suite (reset_semantics) produces recall@1 performance that reverses the ordering observed on the primary suites, the claim's generalizability is falsified (the Decision MUST note this as an override).
